nasb.text: Any of the food which may be eaten, on which water comes, shall become unclean, and any liquid which may be drunk in every vessel shall become unclean.

esv.text: Any food in it that could be eaten, on which water comes, shall be unclean. And all drink that could be drunk from every such vessel shall be unclean.

cnv.text: 瓦器的水若是滴在任何食物上，食物就成了不潔淨，若是滴在裝了飲料的器皿裡，飲料也成為不潔淨。

ccb.text: 陶器里的水如果滴到食物上，食物就不洁净；如果滴到盛饮料的器皿里，饮料也不洁净。
